---
title: "SEH2Bioinfo"
description: |
  Web Development for the SEH2Bioinfo Symposium.
categories: 
  - 🌐Web development
  - 📚Education
  - 🧬Bioinformatics
date: "2022-06-02"
image: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SEH2Bioinfo-Org/SEH2Bioinfo/HEAD/assets/media/icon.png
draft: false
---

[{{< fa brands github >}} Source code][source-code]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify icon-park-outline web-page >}} Website][website]{.btn target=_blank} 

This project involved the development and maintenance of the official website for the **Symposium of Spanish-Speaking Students in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology (SEH2Bioinfo)**.

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SEH2Bioinfo-Org/SEH2Bioinfo/HEAD/assets/media/icon.png" width="300" title="SEH2Bioinfo-logo">
</p>

## Background

In 2022, the first **SEH2Bioinfo** was organized, being the first bioinformatics event driven by a massive collaboration between Spanish-speaking Regional Student Groups (RSGs). The project united student organizations from **Argentina, Spain, Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador, Chile, Peru, Mexico, and Uruguay**.

The symposium was established to promote **linguistic diversity in the scientific community**. By centering Spanish as the primary language for communication, the project aimed to **eliminate barriers to scientific access** and empower students—from high school to postgraduate levels—to present their research in their native language.

## Additional information 

To learn more about the project, the community, and the technical implementation, you can explore the [SEH2Bioinfo website][website] and its [source code][source-code]. You can also find more information about the RSGs and the mission to promote diversity in science within the webpage's resources.

[website]: https://seh2bioinfo.netlify.app/
[source-code]: https://github.com/SEH2Bioinfo-Org/SEH2Bioinfo
